name: brajyatra-complete
description: Complete BrajYatra.AI — Sacred Braj Travel Planner with AI Agent, Auth, and Virtual Tours

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start:prod: set NODE_ENV=production && cd server && node index.js
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd agent && npm install && cd ../auth && npm install && cd ../../client && npm install
